name: conversate
description: Plugin-owned skills for the Conversate conversation recorder: save, resume, list, park, sidekick, return, continue, and regen topic-bound records in the Conversation database.

interface.shortDescription: Save and resume distilled agent conversations.
interface.longDescription: Conversate stores topic-bound conversations as distilled, resumable records in the Conversation database. Codex exposes the same conversate verb inventory as the shipped skills: /conversate:save, /conversate:resume, /conversate:list, /conversate:park, /conversate:sidekick, /conversate:return, /conversate:continue, and /conversate:regen.
